testcase.name: publishMessageDelivered_shouldPublishEventSuccessfully
testcase.system-out: Standard Commons Logging discovery in action with spring-jcl: please remove commons-logging.jar from classpath in order to avoid potential conflicts 13:40:01.043 [main] INFO com.turaf.communications.infrastructure.messaging.EventBridgePublisher -- MessageDelivered event published successfully: messageId=msg-1, conversationId=conv-1

testcase.name: publishMessageDelivered_shouldThrowExceptionOnFailure
testcase.system-out: 13:40:01.046 [main] ERROR com.turaf.communications.infrastructure.messaging.EventBridgePublisher -- Failed to publish event: [] 13:40:01.046 [main] ERROR com.turaf.communications.infrastructure.messaging.EventBridgePublisher -- Error publishing MessageDelivered event java.lang.RuntimeException: Failed to publish MessageDelivered event at testcase.name: publishMessageDelivered_shouldHandleClientException
testcase.system-out: 13:40:01.049 [main] ERROR com.turaf.communications.infrastructure.messaging.EventBridgePublisher -- Error publishing MessageDelivered event java.lang.RuntimeException: EventBridge error at software.amazon.awssdk.services.eventbridge.EventBridgeClient.putEvents(EventBridgeClient.java:3240) at com.turaf.communications.infrastructure.messaging.EventBridgePublisher.publishMessageDelivered(EventBridgePublisher.java:40) at testcase.name: publishMessageDelivered_shouldIncludeCorrectEventDetails
testcase.system-out: 13:40:01.053 [main] INFO com.turaf.communications.infrastructure.messaging.EventBridgePublisher -- MessageDelivered event published successfully: messageId=msg-1, conversationId=conv-1

testcase.name: publishMessageDelivered_shouldSerializeEventToJson
testcase.system-out: 13:40:01.056 [main] INFO com.turaf.communications.infrastructure.messaging.EventBridgePublisher -- MessageDelivered event published successfully: messageId=msg-1, conversationId=conv-1
